title: Is there a shared board/template where I can find a list of HELP links, or tutorial Links?

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu (Mihai Oprisenescu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @everybody
Is there a shared board/template where I can find a list of HELP links, or tutorial Links?
i am searching for a board /table with this links and help. Not websites , or anything else. Im just curious if someone already create like a database for this type of help links ( useful boards, useful info, useful help, useful integrations and automations, useful ideas, etc)

IF YOU WANT THIS TYPE OF BOARD, leave a LIKE so i can now and create one and publish it.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mihai.oprisenescu,

We love this idea! Whilst we don’t have a shareable board available, we do have our dedicated help center where all of our resources sit which you’re welcome to reference if you’re interested in setting up this shareable board! We are also available to assist with any questions that you might run into along the way

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu (Mihai Oprisenescu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oky, I see that Monday doesnt have a Help in monay boards, but maybe there are a few who started creating their own.

If someone is nice enough to share it with me here or in private, I will continue to work on a copy of their board, or I will start my own, but for the moment i have no idea from where to start because its so much material.

if there are some refrences or category links i will start from there, if not, i wil check the help thing, but it’s somehow redundand if its already one click away.
We will see… maybe I can pin this post somehow and see if others are in nedd for this type of board. maybe to be shared also with their customers as a help assistant board.
